note: Approximate SCHEDULED morning arrival times (IST) at Tirupati, used two ways: (1) the dashboard draws them as landing markers on the depletion curve, and (2) the scraper starts polling (earliest arrival minus start_buffer_min) so it is already running before the first flight lands, then stops when available hits 0. These are SCHEDULED times, not live wheels-down times; the real 'first flight landed' signal is the first drop in the token curve. Edit freely as the timetable changes.
sources: user itinerary: 6E 6567 HYD-TIR arr 07:20 on Sep 9

arrivals.note: route of your Sep 9 flight; Hyderabad dep 06:10
